title: Wheezing and Chest Tightness - Moderate Persistent Asthma
chief_complaint: Recurrent episodes of wheezing, chest tightness, dry cough especially at night

hidden_data.pft: FEV1 65% predicted, FEV1/FVC 0.68, significant reversibility post-bronchodilator (+12%)

correct_diagnosis: Moderate Persistent Asthma with Allergic Component

patient_responses.night_symptoms: I wake up coughing at 2 AM
